title: DevOps foundations: The core principles and practices
summary: Explore DevOps practices using GitHub. Your development and operations teams will experience improved collaboration, agility, continuous integration, continuous delivery, automation, and operational excellence throughout all phases of the application lifecycle. (AZ-2008)

sections.title: DevOps foundations: The core principles and practices
sections.summary: Explore DevOps practices using GitHub. Your development and operations teams will experience improved collaboration, agility, continuous integration, continuous delivery, automation, and operational excellence throughout all phases of the application lifecycle. (AZ-2008)

lessons.title: Discover DevOps
lessons.content_md:
This module explores how DevOps practices optimize application lifecycle management for accelerated time to market and operational stability.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/discover-devops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Plan with DevOps
lessons.content_md:
In this module you learn how to plan your software development projects agilely using GitHub Projects boards.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/plan-with-devops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Develop with DevOps
lessons.content_md:
Streamline updates to your software development projects by applying version control with Git and GitHub. Your software lifecycle improves through the implementation of continuous integration, shift-left testing, and shift-left security.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/develop-with-devops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Deliver with DevOps
lessons.content_md:
Build and run continuous integration and continuous delivery workflows using GitHub Actions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deliver-with-devops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Operate with DevOps
lessons.content_md:
Achieve operational excellence and enhance developer experience in your organization through DevOps. Your operational and development practices improve by implementing shift-right testing, observability through performance and security monitoring, Site Reliability Engineering and platform engineering.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/operate-with-devops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica DevOps foundations: The core principles and practices
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **DevOps foundations: The core principles and practices**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
